Dev.releaseNotes:
`misc`: **Order images for groups/series/episodes in dedicated image endpoints**.

`revert`: **Revert "repo(docker): modernise Dockerfile and build pipeline "** ([#1365](https://github.com/ShokoAnime/ShokoServer/pull/1365)):

This reverts commit 6b90f00287417338a43ee6da97136e1b7f3127cf for now.

`fix` (`tmdb`): **Guard against null `Translations` in `Populate` for show and movie models** ([#1374](https://github.com/ShokoAnime/ShokoServer/pull/1374)). (_Skip CI_)

`fix`: **Correct web component manifest property name**.

`fix`: **Check mtime of index to determine if we should update it**.

`fix`: **Check if dir exists before enumerating**.

`refactor`: **Cache availability flag in the database**:

Replaced the per-access file-system checks for image availability with a
stored `IsAvailable` flag on `ShokoImage`, set on download/upload and
recomputed during validation, so the hot read paths no longer hit disk.

- Added the stored `IsAvailable` column plus a `RefreshAvailability()`
  helper on `ShokoImage`, mapped in `ShokoImageMap`
- `ShokoImage_Entity.IsAvailable` now delegates to the image's cached flag
  instead of scanning the directory
- Added `IsPrimaryAvailable` to `IImage`/`IImageCrossReference` (and
  `ImageStub`) for the primary image in a linked group
- `DownloadImage`/`UploadImage`/`AddImage` set the flag, and
  `ValidateAllImages` recomputes and persists it
- Added `DatabaseFixes.PopulateImageAvailability` (parallel disk scan in
  batches of 20) and schema migrations for SQLite/MySQL/SQL Server

`repo` (`workflows`): **Use web ui manifest to select version to download**.

`feat`: **Add isAvailable and linkedEntityImages filter params to image entity queries**:

Appended missing optional parameters across the image entity query
stack — `IImage`, `IWithImages`, `IImageManager`, and all 23 model
implementors — and added the corresponding filtering logic to the
service layer and controller endpoints.

- `IImage.GetCrossReferences`: added `isAvailable`, `primaryImage`,
  and changed `includeLinkedImages` from `bool?` to `bool`
- `IWithImages.GetImages`/`GetImageCrossReferences`: added all
  missing optional params and updated default implementations
- `IImageManager.GetAllImages`/`GetAllImageCrossReferences`/`GetImagesForEntity`/`GetImageCrossReferencesForEntity`:
  added `isAvailable` and `linkedEntityImages` with filtering logic
- `ImageManager`: filter by `isAvailable` on cross-references
- `ImageManagementController`: exposed new params as query string
  arguments on `/api/v3/Image/Management` endpoints
- All 23 `IWithImages` implementors: corrected `GetImages` and
  `GetImageCrossReferences` signatures to match the interface,
  turning them from accidental overloads into proper overrides

`feat`: **Add ImageStub.Wrap static helper**.

`refactor`: **Wrap group images from other entities with ImageStub and add GetPreferredImages**:

- Wrap images returned from mainSeries, group, and default with
  `ImageStub.Wrap(..., linkedXref: true)` so they carry proper
  cross-reference metadata
- Replace bare `return mainSeries.Default*Image` with wrapped
  null-terminated fallback chain in all five image type getters
  (primary, backdrop, logo, banner, disc)
- Standardize variable naming in `*CrossReference` getters:
  `preferredImage` → `preferredImageCrossReference`,
  `mainSeriesPreferredImage` → `mainSeriesPreferredImageCrossReference`
- Add `GetPreferredImages()` to `AnimeGroup` returning one image
  per type, wired into `Group.cs` API model
- Update `Group.cs` to use `GetPreferredImages()` instead of the
  unfiltered `GetImages()` call

`feat`: **Add GetPreferredImages to AnimeSeries and update Series API model**:

Add `GetPreferredImages()` to `AnimeSeries` returning a curated
one-image-per-type list (primary, backdrop, logo, banner, disc)
with fallback logic when the preferred primary is unavailable.

Update `Series.cs` API model to use `GetPreferredImages()` instead
of the unfiltered `GetImages(isEnabled: true, isDesired: true)`.

`chore` (`abstractions`): **Bump abstractions version to v6.0.0-alpha.65**.

`repo` (`docker`): **Modernise Dockerfile and build pipeline** ([#1365](https://github.com/ShokoAnime/ShokoServer/pull/1365)): (_Skip CI_)

Rewrites Dockerfile as packaging-only, drops aarch64 variant, and
consolidates multi-platform builds into a single workflow across daily,
release, and manual pipelines.

`feat` (`tmdb`): **Add daily job to purge orphaned TMDB data** ([#1371](https://github.com/ShokoAnime/ShokoServer/pull/1371)): (_Skip CI_)

Added a daily recurring job that purges TMDB shows and movies from the
local database when they have no cross-references and have not been
updated within the configured threshold period.

- Added `olderThan` parameter to `PurgeAllUnusedShows` and
  `PurgeAllUnusedMovies` on `ITmdbMetadataService` and
  `TmdbMetadataService`; the age filter is applied inside those methods
  so the full cross-reference check (all 9 xref types) is respected
- `PurgeOrphanedTmdbDataJob` delegates to the service methods rather
  than reimplementing orphan detection

`fix`: **Fix an edge case that prevented some series from showing in Release Management**.

`fix`: **Add missing `forceScan` parameter In managed folder scans** ([#1373](https://github.com/ShokoAnime/ShokoServer/pull/1373)):

- Pass the forceScan parameter to ScheduleScanForManagedFolder during the default fallback logic when onlyNewFiles is null
- Ensure that manual import commands can properly force re-evaluation of unrecognized files that have exceeded the maximum auto-scan attempts

`misc`: **Remove Database Locking and Make PocoCache Thread Safe**.

`fix`: **Add database indexes to speed up missing episode queries**:

The MissingEpisodesQuery, MissingCollectingEpisodesQuery, and their
anime-filtered variants were timing out (>120s) against ~291k episodes
and ~64k group statuses due to missing indexes causing full table scans
and automatic temporary indexes in the correlated subqueries.

Five indexes added across all supported backends (SQLite, MySQL, SQL
Server):

- IX_CrossRef_File_Episode_EpisodeID — the NOT EXISTS
  (CFE.EpisodeID = ADBE.EpisodeID) check had no index on SQLite/SQL
  Server (was dropped at v89 on SQLite, never existed on SQL Server).
  MySQL already had this index from the original schema.

- IX_AniDB_Episode_EpisodeType_AirDate — the WHERE filter
  (EpisodeType=1 AND AirDate NOT NULL AND AirDate < now) previously
  relied on the single-column EpisodeType index and scanned all matching
  rows to check AirDate.

- IX_AniDB_Episode_AnimeID_EpisodeType — the collecting variant's
  deeply nested EXISTS subquery joins ADBE2.AnimeID to a correlated
  outer value. Without statistics, SQLite's planner prefers scanning
  by EpisodeType (208k rows) over seeking by AnimeID. This composite
  covers both equality conditions and wins the heuristic regardless
  of whether ANALYZE has been run.

- IX_AnimeEpisode_IsHidden_AniDB_EpisodeID — the IsHidden=0 filter
  and join had no covering index, forcing a full scan of the
  AnimeEpisode table before joining.

- IX_StoredReleaseInfo_ED2K — the MissingCollectingEpisodesQuery's
  nested EXISTS joins SRI.ED2K to CrossRef_File_Episode.Hash with no
  index on SRI, forcing SQLite to build an automatic partial covering
  index at query time for every invocation of the correlated subquery.

Before: both queries timed out at 120s+. After: 0.19s (non-collecting)
and 4s (collecting).
`misc`: **Performance improvements in SQLite. Update Stats in a missing code path**.
`misc`: **Improvements to Dashboard Performance**.
`misc`: **Improve Performance and Simplify Filtering a bit**.

`fix`: **Add back semaphore to restrict the number of concurrent filtering runs**.

`chore`: **Sort and remove unnecessary imports**.
`misc`: **Missing Files and Performance Improvements**.

`chore`: **Remove legacy `FileName` field from file↔episode cross-reference**.

`fix`: **More forgiving xref percentage groupings**.
`fix`: **Correct reverse `for` loop condition**.

`refactor`: **Simplify GetRandomImageCrossReference and add isAvailable filter**:

Replaced the custom gambling algorithm with GetRandomElement() for
uniform random selection. Changed primaryImage from bool to bool?
to act as a proper nullable filter.

Added IImageCrossReference.IsAvailable backed by a filesystem check
in ShokoImage_Entity, and wired the isAvailable filter parameter
through all query methods. APIv2/v3 random image endpoints now pass
isAvailable: true to skip unavailable images at query time.

`chore` (`abstractions`): **Bump abstractions version to v6.0.0-alpha.64**.

`feat` (`plugin`): **Add svg support for plugin and package thumbnails**:

Added MagickFormat.Svg and MagickFormat.Svgz mappings to
GetMimeFromFormat so that MagickImageInfo can return the correct MIME
type for SVG files. This enables SVG thumbnails in both PluginManager
and PluginPackageManager, where the MIME-from-format lookup is used
after reading thumbnail dimensions.

`feat` (`api`): **Add `difficultyClass` param to random image cross-reference lookup**:

Added a `difficultyClass` parameter (1-20, D&D-style DC) to
`GetRandomImageCrossReference`, replacing the hardcoded `roll == 20`
with a configurable threshold.

- `IImageManager`: added `[Range(1, 20)] int difficultyClass = 20`
- `ImageManager`: added validation and `threshold = difficultyClass + 1`
- `ImageManagementController` (APIv3): exposed as query param (default 10)
- `Image` (APIv2): hardcoded `difficultyClass: 10` without exposing

`chore` (`abstractions`): **Bump abstractions version to v6.0.0-alpha.63**.

`refactor` (`filters`): **Add cancellation support and improve thread safety**:

Added CancellationToken parameter propagation through the filter
evaluation pipeline, from the API controller down through
`IFilteringEngine` and `IMetadataFilteringService` methods. The
controller passes `HttpContext.RequestAborted` to respect client
disconnects.

Introduced a `Lock` in `FilteringEngine` to serialize filter
evaluation, preventing race conditions from concurrent access.

Removed the unused `IFilteringEngine` dependency from
`FilterController`, accessing it via `IMetadataFilteringService.Engine`
instead. Also dropped underscore prefixes from repository field
names to match project conventions.

`chore` (`abstractions`): **Bump abstractions version to v6.0.0-alpha.62**.

`refactor` (`filters`): **Replace Lock with SemaphoreSlim and allow 2 concurrent filter evaluations**.

`refactor` (`filters`): **Add cancellation token support to batch operations**:

Extended CancellationToken propagation to the batch filter methods
in both IFilteringEngine (BatchPrepareFiltersWithTuples,
BatchPrepareFiltersWithGrouping) and IMetadataFilteringService
(BatchFilterGroups, BatchFilterSeries).

The token is captured in lazy evaluation closures and checked
before materialization. In InternalBatchPrepareFilters it is also
passed to _filterSemaphore.Wait() so semaphore acquisition respects
cancellation.

Wired HttpContext.RequestAborted from the v3 FilterController
(GetAllFilters) and FilterFactory (GetFilters) down to the engine.
